creator: contact@shiori.com.br
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
Salute,

Despite being a shell script and gathering info about ports and packages, it is actually not that different.

Since we have some similar tools (neofetch, pfetch, ufetch, bsdinfo, etc.), I'd say that “one more wouldn't hurt”, but if it is considered redundant, no problem.

Cheers.
